Uses of Package
com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm

  • Packages that use com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm
    This package contains the World Magnetic Model (WMM) implementation to estimate Earth's magnetic flux density.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.bias
    Contains approximate bias (or hard iron for the magnetometer case) estimators.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer
    Contains classes for magnetometer calibration.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators
    Contains estimators for several inertial entities.
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm used by com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm 
    Class Description
    WorldMagneticModel
    Contains data defining the World Magnetic Model (WWM).
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm used by com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.bias 
    Class Description
    WMMEarthMagneticFluxDensityEstimator
    Estimates Earth magnetic flux density resolved around NED frame at a given Earth location.
    WorldMagneticModel
    Contains data defining the World Magnetic Model (WWM).
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm used by com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.magnetometer 
    Class Description
    WMMEarthMagneticFluxDensityEstimator
    Estimates Earth magnetic flux density resolved around NED frame at a given Earth location.
    WorldMagneticModel
    Contains data defining the World Magnetic Model (WWM).
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.geodesic.wmm used by com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators 
    Class Description
    WMMEarthMagneticFluxDensityEstimator
    Estimates Earth magnetic flux density resolved around NED frame at a given Earth location.
    WorldMagneticModel
    Contains data defining the World Magnetic Model (WWM).
